intent: Explain the doctrine of 'fair use' in US copyright. (1) Wikipedia — 'Fair use' and 'Copyright Act of 1976'. 5+ facts on the 4-factor test and 2+ landmark cases. (2) Reddit /f/YouTube or /f/AskReddit — 2+ posts on how creators interpret fair use in practice. The report must: (a) present the 4 factors with citations, (b) apply them to a hypothetical, (c) close with where creator intuition diverges from case law. Cite every claim.
